overview: Strange Waves is a music streaming and NFT minting platform on the Internet Computer. Artists can upload audio, create album pages, mint NFTs with rich metadata, and run a marketplace — all with persistent on-chain storage.
features: Audio upload and streaming with persistent canister storage
NFT minting with DIP-721 and ICRC-7 standards
NFT marketplace with listing, buying, and transfer
Album pages (SScc Collection, Knight of the Soul, Mystic Fire, Krypto Beatz, Wellness Wednesday)
Persistent bottom bar audio player with popup controls
Playlist system with Audius integration and share links
Track editing: delete, genre tags, drag-to-sort, edit cover image
In-app wallet with ICP/stablecoin balances and NFT management
About and Socials pages with social profile links
